programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As the new editor of his school paper, Alex uncovers a cheating scandal and to everyone's chagrin, prints a list of students who were caught including Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To the dismay of the Keaton children and their equally conservative grandparents, Steven and Elyse take time out Thanksgiving Day to attend an anti-nuke rally-and end up spending the holiday in jail.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Though Alex loves working at Mr. Adler's "Mom and Pop" grocery store, to the old man's dismay, he quits to "climb the corporate ladder" at an ultramodern supermarket.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The Keatons consider buying a gun for protection after getting burglarized.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory resents Elyse for the advice she gives her pregnant friend.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As Big Brother to a 10-year-old Vietnamese boy, Alex tries to mold Ming into his own image, and he learns an unforgettable lesson when he breaks a promise to the adoring child.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex gets stuck babysitting for his little sister Jennifer, who is fed up with feeling in the way at his poker game and decides to disappear.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse realize how lucky they are when their friends come over for a visit, but are unaware that it will be for the last time.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex takes diet pills for a lift during midterms, his dependency level increases daily.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven's assistant at the station is bright, talented, funny, and witty...and in love with him.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While working as a DJ at the school radio station, Alex strikes up a telephone friendship with caller Lorraine Ferrar.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse worry that Jennifer's softball team coach is pushing the girls too hard.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex anxiously awaits a crucial college recommendation from his English teacher.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: On his 18th birthday, Alex defies his mother and goes off with some of his buddies to celebrate at an out-of-town nightclub.

programme.title: PDC Darts
programme.desc: Watch and wager as the world's best darts players compete in top tournaments.

programme.title: Horse Racing
programme.desc: Live horse racing from America's top racetracks.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: It's all to play for in Las Vegas, as this high stakes cash game concludes. Jennifer Tilly and Sam Grafton battle for supremacy, while Gerard Piqué is determined to finally get the better of the poker pros and dig himself out of a hole.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: Time to raise the stakes in Vegas. The minimum buy-in is now $100,000 and the line-up is one of the toughest ever assembled. Lex Veldhuis is reunited with his nemesis Alan Keating. Plus, high roller Jason Koon makes his Big Game debut.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: The high stakes cash game continues in Las Vegas, with $1,000,000 on the table. The Keating-Veldhuis rivalry is reaching boiling point, while Loose Cannon Luke Moy faces the ultimate test.

programme.title: eBasketball: H2H GG League
programme.desc: Coverage of top eBasketball gamers competing head-to-head in competitive matchups.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a wealthy teenager learn about humility when his family loses its money.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a young man kills the only person who ever really believed in him, he faces a bleak future until the Angels intervene.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town's Christmas spirit is in question when a family who are Jewish immigrants moves to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully is appointed Indian agent to the Cheyenne and approaches it in an idealistic fashion. When the food intended for the tribe is diverted and illegal alcohol is plentiful, Sully becomes angry.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A newspaper report of a comet's imminent collision with Earth causes hysteria in town over the end of the world.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sam Lindsay, an older independent woman, decides to end her medical treatment and take off into the wilderness.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian's biological father Ethan returns to town with a new wife, intending to take the children away from Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian run away to keep their father from taking them away from Dr. Mike and Sully. After they are found, it's discovered Colleen has developed pneumonia. Dr. Mike realizes she has to let them go to save them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town puts on a production of Romeo and Juliet. Brian tries to learn what love is so he can write a paper for school.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike convinces Robert E to take a job fixing a train boiler, then finds out it is a dangerous job.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A teenage Belle Star robs the saloon with the Younger brothers and is shot. Dr. Mike takes her home in an effort to show her a real home life, attempting to turn her from her life of crime.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: An abrasive Dr. John Porter arrives in town after hearing of the discovery of dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Dr. Mike becomes the substitute school teacher, the town gets upset when she teaches the children about evolution.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully convince Chief Black Kettle that he should move his starving people to a new reservation. Dr. Mike and Sully are both working on wedding presents for each other.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Four hundred years after being frozen in time, a Ming Dynasty palace guard and his three associates are thawed and left to adjust to the modern-day.

programme.title: Iceman: The Time Traveler
programme.desc: In the action-packed second chapter of the Iceman saga, Ying's heroic fight to rewrite history and reclaim his honor continues but those he trusts most may be leading into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Kung Fu Killer
programme.desc: Released from prison, a kung-fu expert (Donnie Yen) tries to help the police find a vicious serial killer (Wang Baoqiang) who targets martial-arts masters.

programme.title: Chasing the Dragon
programme.desc: Donnie Yen stars as infamous real-life drug kingpin Crippled Ho, who ruthlessly carved out his empire in 1960's Hong Kong.

programme.title: Raging Fire
programme.desc: Shan (Donnie Yen) is a hardline cop with a long history of success, but his past comes back to haunt him when a sting is attacked by a group led by his former protégé (Nicholas Tse), a man set on destroying everyone who ever wronged him.

programme.title: Sakra
programme.desc: Starring & directed by international action star Donnie Yen—When a respected martial artist is accused of murder, he goes on the run in search of answers about his own mysterious origin story and the unknown enemies working to destroy him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1985, Julie Estes was kidnapped from the Southside convenience store where she worked. Her body was found the next day, but the killing went unsolved until 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most brazen crimes of the 20th century. Adolph Coors III, chairman of the Coors Brewing Company, was kidnapped and held for ransom. The crime prompted one of the most intense manhunts in United States history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.desc: Rita traps the Power Rangers on a mysterious island where not all is as it appears.

programme.desc: The Rangers must overcome their own fears to escape Rita's Island of Illusion.

programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Our heroes have no choice but to ask The Undreamnt to help them in their fight against D-Shock and the Happy App.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A night terror is on the hunt at the fall festival and so is the Night Hunter, who appears in the Waking World with a brand-new threat for Mateo.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Harl attempts to prevent Tippy from bringing the fabled "Mars Door" back to Earth. Tippy Dorman, faces the trial of the century after his attempt to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast-paced, zany city-wide chase. Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mastermind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's "Hands Off Day!" a city holiday, where the entire city doesn't use their hands for anything. A nature documentary crew follows Billionaire Fendrich as if he was an animal in the wild.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Vic and Owen find themselves, along with Sinjin, in the middle of a massive dino-fight in the old Jurassic Park Visitor Center!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: It's déjà vu for Alan Grant as he returns to Isla Nublar and winds up stranded in the jungle during a dangerous storm with injured Simon and hero-worshipping Owen!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking in the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible ... but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The mystery bounty hunter tracks Ras and Arin to the World Forest, while the Ninja search for the last Prismatic Blade.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin must choose between Ras and the Ninja as the battle for the Prismatic Blades rages across the World Forest.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja hurry to the First Land to stop the Forbidden Five from freeing ThunderFang, and Wyldfyre discovers a drastic cure to Roby's decay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en la diversión acuática, embarcados en aventuras que los harán chapotear.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un viaje de coraje y valentía, en el que aprenderán a enfrentarse a nuevos retos con una sonrisa y con confianza.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus aventuras de juego. Desde la imitación hasta los sustos a la hora de dormir, lavarse las manos, la paciencia, la búsqueda de juguetes, las ovejas sucias y el alegre cucú, ¡es un día de risas y juegos!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus aventuras llenas de risas y lecciones de vida. Aprenden a tomar decisiones saludables y la alegría de ayudar.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en una aventura mágica! Desde momentos tranquilos hasta monos juguetones, cuentos de hadas, búsquedas de huevos de Pascua, parques de diversiones, cumpleaños y paciencia, ¡es un día de maravillas y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Explora la seguridad con Little Angel! Desde el patio de recreo hasta la los primeros auxilios, pasando por la hora de la siesta y el cuidado de la piel. Será un viaje lleno de diversión para mantenerte a salvo.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mientras Esteban está en la habitación del amor dos de sus invitadas provocan un conflicto en la casa. Lo que en principio era una fiesta de risas y cachondeo se convierte en una guerra donde el joven acabará perdiendo los estribos

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Cuando todo era paz y armonía la llegada de la Boss, hará poner las pilas a los chicos antes de que vayan a pasar un día de campo. Con los chicos cansados de pasar un día en el campo llega una nueva fuente de energía, Potro vuelve al grupo

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Después del encontronazo viene la pelea y así es como comienza el capítulo. Todos los chicos intentan mediar en la pelea, pero entre ellas ya no se toleran y no dudarán en utilizar todas sus armas para conseguir dañar a su oponente

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¿Seguirán juntos, Igor y Arantxa?, ¿Qué ocurrirá entre Jawy y Elettra?, y cómo será la última noche de los chicos en Madrid? Fiesta, amor, celos y lágrimas estarán presentes en el último capítulo de Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los chicos ven por primera vez su verano y reaccionan aquellos momentos vividos tanto en Mykonos, Madrid y Barcelona

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los chicos de Súper Shore se reúnen para revivir y ver por primera vez los momentos más importantes del verano y lo que eso conlleva, descubrirán muchos hechos que quizá nos les haga mucha gracia

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¡Vuelve la locura de Super Shore a las costas mediterráneas! Uno a uno llegan a la mansión, la tropa internacional de la fiesta, con una sorpresa enorme para toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Esteban está de mal humor y nadie entiende por qué, su amistad con Fernando pende de un hilo y eso genera tensión en el grupo. Mientras tanto de Italia le llega una sorpresa enorme a Abraham.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mientras los chicos se encuentran en una fiesta, aparece sorpresivamente una amiga italiana de Abraham que provocará un gran conflicto de regreso a la casa. El verano Marbellí está que arde y el calor parece afectar las emociones de todos.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La relación entre Igor y Talía cada vez se hace más intensa y amorosa y por supuesto esto a Arantxa no le cae nada bien y la pone en un lugar caliente, llevando la tensión a toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todos contra todos, Electra y Arantxa atacan a Igor, el brasileño ataca a Electra, la casa es un revuelo y encima llega visita que se pone demasiado pesada.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La situación de Talía e Igor no estaría siendo la mejor. No hablar con Arantxa la lleva a quedar expuesta porque la española toma la iniciativa y le dice sus verdades.

programme.desc: An arsonist is about to torch Matlock’s favorite men’s store and one of the owners will become Matlock’s next case after his partner is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.desc: When Matlock is slapped by an attractive older woman in a restaurant, Ben recalls to Julie the story of his first case – the murder of the man who put him through law school.

programme.desc: It’s a race against time as Matlock tries to save conman Adam Spangler from being executed for a murder he claims he never committed.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use tuning whistles. Daniel has the idea to give the cereal to people who might need food. Neighbor Aber brings a forklift to gather all the boxes. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make it.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Arenita planean darle un hermoso regalo a Patricio en el día de San Valentín. / Bob Esponja juega con un trozo de papel que quiere Calamardo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo reúne a Bob Esponja y Patricio para buscar el tesoro escondido del holandés volador. / Bob y Patricio toman un autobús que los deja atrapados en una ciudad muy extraña, llamada Fondo de Roca.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Arenita quiere volver a Texas, pero Bob Esponja y Patricio tratan de evitarlo. / Plankton intenta enseñarle a Bob Esponja a ser malo como él.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo se estremece cuando ve que es el día de los inocentes, Bob Esponja hace bromas en el día de los inocentes. / Bob Esponja saca la espátula de Neptuno, pero Neptuno lo reta al no creer que el la sacó.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio van a un lugar donde hay muchos anzuelos y ellos juegan con los anzuelos sin saber que en verdad son muy peligrosos. / Bob Esponja gana un concurso y gana la trompa de alarma de Triton y Chico Percebe.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja olvida como amarrarse las agujetas y deberá volver a aprender pero aparentemente nadie en Fondo de Bikini puede ayudarle. / Don Cangrejo es llevado al hospital y Calamardo queda a cargo del Crustáceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Todo Fondo de Bikini huye de Bob Esponja, Patricio le dice que es por ser feo pero en realidad Bob Esponja tiene mal aliento. / Perlita obtiene un trabajo en el Crustáceo Cascarudo, se encarga de ponerlo a la moda.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio se obsesiona con Bob Esponja por todos los premios que ha ganado y él nunca ha podido ganar uno. / Bob Esponja crea un amigo hecho de burbuja pero su nuevo amigo causa muchos problemas a donde quiera que va.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo le da a Bob Esponja un pastel explosivo por error como regalo de intercambio del día de la hermandad. / Plankton construye un robot con la apariencia de Don Cangrejo para obtener la fórmula de la Cangreburguer.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Arenita se va de vieje y les deja al cuidado todas sus mascotas a Bob Esponja y Patricio. / A Bob Esponja se le ocurre vender cangreburguers de colores para hacerlas más llamativas y atraer más clientes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Cuando Bob Esponja llega al Crustáceo Cascarudo, todos se burlan de el por tener un beso de su abuela en la frente. / Calamardo esta harto de vivir junto a Bob Esponja y Patricio, decide irse a vivir a otra ciudad.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Las familias escapan a las montañas para pasar Navidad. Las vacaciones se tornan peligrosas cuando Tommy y Carlitos ponen trampas para Santa por toda la cabaña y el papá de Carlitos se viste como Santa y trata de bajar por la chimenea.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de escuchar una historia del Abuelo, Tommy sueña con que los extraterrestres lo llevan adentro de una nave espacial. / Cuando el Abuelo pierde a Tommy, decide usar sus técnicas de investigador de los años 30’s para encontrarlo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando un juego de escondidas se pone extraño, Carlitos pierde sus lentes y el mundo le parece como una pesadilla borrosa. / Un zorrillo moja a Carlitos y él se pone más triste que nunca.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando a Tommy le sacan su osito preferido, decide tomar el consejo de Angélica y empieza a portarse mal. / Angélica recibe un juego de magia como regalo. Ella y los Rugrats se sorprenden cuando Angélica hace desaparecer a Lili.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Una nueva familia se muda en frente de la casa de Tommy y él inmediatamente se hace amigo de su nueva vecina de tres años, Susie. / Hugo le compra a Tommy un juego para armar, pero los bebés se entretienen más con la caja del juguete.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que Angélica les cuenta una historia de terror, Tommy y Carlitos comienzan a tener miedo de irse por el desagüe de la bañera. / Cuando el hermano de Didi se casa, Tommy y Carlitos se obsesionan con el pastel.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos pierden sin querer a Cynthia, la muñeca favorita de Angélica y tienen que decidir si contárselo o no a Angélica. / Carlitos tiene un amigo imaginario que se llama Barney, que nadie puede ver o escuchar, solamente Carlos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats piensan que un camión de basura que pasa todas las semanas es un monstruo que se llama Hubert. / Los Rugrats ven un programa de televisión sobre un perro que habla, y se convencen de que Firulais los está rechazando.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de una experiencia traumática, Carlitos comienza a temerle a los toboganes. Tommy, Susie, Fili y Lili lo ayudan a superar su miedo. / Los Rugrats van a una piscina pública y la confunden con un inodoro gigante.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras el Abuelo compite en un campeonato de bolos, los Rugrats se van a explorar y descubren que el contrincante del Abuelo está haciendo trampa. / Angélica es castigada por Julio, así que decide dejar su casa e irse a la de Tommy.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi concursa en un juego peligroso de televisión en donde tiene que enfrentar sus propios miedos. / Boris y Minka cuidan a Tommy y Angélica por un fin de semana, pero no se acuerdan bien de sus técnicas de cuidar a niños.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica salva a Carlitos de ser atropellado por un niño en triciclo, ella decide que Carlitos debe ser su esclavo para siempre. / Los bebés admiran a Susie porque ella siempre los defiende de Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica se entera del Hada de los Dientes, planea hacerse rica sacándole los dientes a Carlitos y metiéndolos bajo su propia almohada. / La imaginación de los Rugrats se enciende cuando el Abuelo les lee el cuento de Aladino.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de Randy es invitado a cenar a la casa, los niños piensan que Susie debe mudarse lejos. Fili y Lili deciden que quieren ser diferentes. Fili trata de ser como Carlitos y Lili trata de ser como Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: A Carlitos le van a cortar el pelo por primera vez, pero él le tiene miedo a los cortes de cabello, por lo que los Rugrats y Chas deciden ayudarlo a superar su miedo. Angélica y Susie son enviadas al mismo campamento.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando el triciclo de Susie se pierde y Angélica aparece montando uno idéntico, Susie la acusa de ser una ladrona. Angélica juega al doctor y le dice a Carlitos que tiene una enfermedad que lo convertirá en un rinoceronte.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El Abuelo comienza a sentir que es una molestia y se muda a una casa de retiro que parecía linda por televisión pero termina siendo aburrida. El Abuelo lleva a los Rugrats de campamento en el patio.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de ir al circo, Angélica prepara su propio circo con los Rugrats como los actores. Los Rugrats intentan encontrar un hermanito para Tommy en un huevo abandonado en un nido.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard struggles to withstand the full force of the Marine onslaught. With the executioner's swords hovering above Ace's head, Straw Hat Luffy discovers a new ability!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard orders his men to help Luffy clear a path to the execution scaffold, but someone close to the Rubber-man rises to derail the rescue mission at the last second!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must defeat the man who taught him how to fight – his own grandfather – in order to save Ace. Battling his own flesh and blood won't be easy, but a waxy ally is there to provide backup!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is finally free from the execution scaffold! Luffy and his brother make a fearsome team as they blaze a path toward salvation. Ravaged by the war, Whitebeard wistfully commands his men to make the journey to the New World without him!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite Whitebeard's order to retreat, Ace is drawn back to the battlefield by the cruel taunts of a Marine adversary. Luffy watches in horror as his brother makes what could be his last stand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An eerie silence falls over the battlefield as Luffy and Ace share a heartbreaking final moment together. With his dying breath, Ace begs his brother to convey a message to his fellow pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Anguished cries echo across the battlefield in the wake of Ace's tragic death. Luffy – paralyzed by grief – must be carried to safety, but Whitebeard summons the strength for one last ferocious attack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard's children watch in horror as the old man faces off against the villainous Blackbeard pirates. Though his injuries are mounting and the odds are stacked against him, Whitebeard never runs away from a fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The world reacts to Whitebeard's death with shock and awe. Meanwhile, Jimbei risks his life to save Luffy. Blackbeard reveals the depraved depths of his nefarious nature!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Blackbeard and his men seek to sink Marineford, Jimbei and Luffy's desperate attempt to flee is thwarted by Akainu's fiery fists. The situation appears dire until a former enemy lends a sandy hand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trafalgar Law and the Heart Pirates offer Luffy a submarine escape route. Blackbeard continues his reckless rampage, and a puny pink-haired marine changes the world with a scream!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Heart Pirates head for the bottom of the ocean as Trafalgar Law prepares to operate on Luffy and Jimbei. Meanwhile, the arrival of Shanks brings the bloodshed to a sudden halt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The world rejoices in the wake of Whitebeard's death, and a host of powerful pirates vie for his position. Meanwhile, Luffy's friends fear that Ace's death may be more than the rubber-man can handle – if he ever wakes up!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Power-hungry pirates terrorize innocent citizens once protected by Whitebeard. Luffy's nightmarish awakening sends him on a reckless rampage that could land him in an early grave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One Piece X Toriko Crossover

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback to the younger days of Luffy and Ace reveals their unusual upbringing under the not-so-watchful eye of villainous mountain bandits!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The flashback continues as Ace robs a ruthless gang of pirates, and Luffy is left to take the fall! Will Ace and his friend Sabo let Luffy be tortured to death - or will they risk their high seas dreams to save him?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace and Sabo race to rescue Luffy from the clutches of a murderous gang of pirates! Sabo wants to grab Luffy and make a break for it, but Ace refuses to back down from a fight – even when he's outnumbered!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When a nobleman recognizes Sabo in the streets, Luffy and Ace learn the painful secret of their friend's past. As a sign of solidarity, the three boys pledge to become pirates and hoist a toast to brotherhood!

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A woman pursuing her dreams is found drugged in her home; across New York, another person with similar symptoms comes forward, and authorities connect the cases, exposing an international fugitive with a ruthless pattern.

programme.title: Snapped

programme.desc: When the spouse of a high-profile defense attorney is found dead in their Arkansas home, police theorize if a disgruntled client could be to blame; the investigation exposes an obsessive admirer with a delusional motive to murder.

programme.desc: ¡En la quinta ronda de la Liga Pokémon, Ash y Richie se enfrentan uno al otro! ¿Sobrevivirá su amistad esta importante batalla?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Brock están en las gradas vitoreando a Richie cuando la Liga Pokémon llega a su fin y marchan juntos en las ceremonias de clausura. ¡Es una experiencia que acompañará a Ash durante todo su viaje como Entrenador!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos regresan a Pueblo Paleta con una gran bienvenida, ¡sólo para ser enviados a otro viaje de inmediato! El Profesor Oak busca una misteriosa Pokébola, y le pide a Ash, Brock y Misty que la encuentren para él.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Los chicos deben viajar a la Isla Valencia para traer una misteriosa Pokébola para el Profesor Oak. Cuando Ash gana un viaje gratis en dirigible, parece que sus penurias terminaron, pero, ¿quién pilotea esta cosa?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras un aterrizaje forzoso en la Isla Valencia, los chicos van al laboratorio de la Profesora Ivy, donde está la misteriosa Pokébola. Brock se asombra al descubrir que la profesora y sus colegas también son criadores Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Gracias a la canción de Jigglypuff, el dirigible de Ash y Misty da vuelta a casa, se sale de curso y se estrella en una isla, donde conocen a un nuevo amigo llamado Tracey mientras intenta ayudar a un Lapras perdido.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a explorar las Islas Naranja, ¡y Ash está decidido a calificar en la Liga Naranja! Pronto descubre que los desafíos del Equipo Naranja son un poco diferentes a las batallas de otros gimnasios.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash, Misty y Tracey llegan a la Isla Mandarina, Pikachu y Togepi se rebelan y se unen a unos Pokémon furiosos. Cuando los Pokémon desaparecen, la Oficial Jenny les habla de la desaparición de docenas de Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash encuentra un mensaje en una botella, el cual lleva a nuestros héroes a una nueva aventura en la Isla Sunburst, y a la búsqueda de un Onix muy especial.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes se encuentran en la Isla Pinkan, hogar de un gran número de Pokémon de colores extraños. Ash y Tracey quedan fascinados con estos Pokémon rosas… ¡al igual que el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras unirse a una expedición científica para investigar el fósil de un Kabuto, Ash y sus amigos pronto se encuentran enfrentando una serie de desastres naturales.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Otro especialista en los Pokémon tipo Agua reta a Misty a una batalla y le ofrece un consejo: ¡él cree que el Psyduck de Misty está listo para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a una muy ocupada Enfermera Joy quien debe saltar por toda la isla para cuidar de todos los Pokémon del área. ¿Podrán ayudar a protegerla del Equipo Rocket?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La exploración de nuestros héroes los lleva a las Islas Toronja, ¡donde se enteran de que la famosa fruta de la isla ha estado desapareciendo! Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a atrapar a quien sea responsable.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Cuando los buzos recuperan un antiguo trofeo de Campeonato de la Liga Naranja, nuestros héroes van directo al museo de arte donde se exhibe para verlo! Desafortunadamente, el Equipo Rocket ya se les adelantó…

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A photographer named Kijin Shinokawa holds a modeling contest. All the girls who have entered begin disappearing after Shinokawa photographs them!

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo’s friend Mika gives him a doll but Shingo unintentionally breaks the doll and hurts Mika’s feelings. Shingo decides to apologize.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi receives a love letter from Tuxedo Mask, stating that he’d like to meet her. She finds out that all the girls in town received the same letter.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.desc: Una dama de honor se encuentra en un coma peligroso; el globo ocular de un hombre sale de su cabeza; un bebé prematuro es abandonado en el baño del hospital y debe ser revivido rápidamente en la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La cabeza de un estudiante universitario es atravesada por las astas de un ciervo trofeo; la víctima de un accidente automovilístico lleva al médico a creer que su bebé aún puede estar en la escena del accidente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una víctima de mordedura de serpiente puede morir en la sala de emergencias porque el antiveneno para salvar vidas es escaso

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El Dr. Boyd Schultz ha sufrido un ataque cardíaco y su esposa, una enfermera en el hospital, llegará en cualquier momento. La embarazada Tiffany McCrank tiene un aneurisma cerebral.

programme.desc: Teal'c and Bra'tac have just returned from the planet Ha'ktyl, where they tried to convince the warrior-woman rebel leader Ishta, to wait until her fellow insurgent Jaffa grow numerous enough to wage war against all the Goa'uld system lords at once.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Stargate is missing. Upon investigation the team notice a scientist tagging the stargate with a locator beacon. It looks like this is the work of The Trust taking whatever ruthless action they deem necessary to protect Earth from alien invaders.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: An old IDC comes through; Send M.A.L.P. The M.A.L.P. telemetry shows that the person sending the transmission is Carter but Carter is in the control room at SGC. The Carter on the other side explains that she is a Replicator.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A mission has been greenlit to take the Prometheus to the Pegasus galaxy. Jackson wants in. O'Neill feels he is too valuable to risk. The decision is overridden by the mission commander, none other than Gen. Hammond, now head of home world security.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Hoping to warn Harry Maybourne of Goa'uld attacks, SG-1 arrives at his last known whereabouts to find that he has been appointed king of a primitive people and believes he possesses writings by a time-traveling Ancient predicting these events.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When O'Neill finds the door to his home forced open and former Vice President Kinsey waiting for him inside, his first instinct is to call the police. But he allies himself with Kinsey when he learns of a rogue organization known as The Trust.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: At a tag sale, civilian Joe Spencer comes across a small stone that gives him visions of SG-1 in action. Delighted, he shares the stories with anyone who will listen. But when he learns that SG-1 really exists, his excitement turns into obsession.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Teal'c and Bra'tac believe the time is right to lead their people in an uprising against the Goa'uld. Their plan suffers a setback when an army of Replicators begins to systematically take control of Goa'uld ships and Jackson is taken prisoner.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Hidden in the ruined temple on Dakara is an Ancient weapon powerful enough to destroy the Replicators. Thanks to a timely warning, the team knows it. And thanks to Daniel's repressed Ancient knowledge, Replicator Carter knows it as well.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With a climactic battle behind them, the team turns towards personal matters. Unbeknownst to them, Anubis prepares one final attempt! Meanwhile, Jackson awakens in a way station between the living world and the world of beings that have ascended.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jackson receives documents that point to the location of a ZPM in ancient Egypt. Hoping that the energy source could be used to power Earth's defenses and open a wormhole to Atlantis, SG-1 uses an ancient time machine to travel back to 3000 B.C.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1's attempt to recover a ZPM from 3000 B.C. has altered the timeline, leading to a present where the Stargate was never discovered! The alternate-reality Carter and Jackson convince a reluctant O'Neill to take them on their first mission through.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After their alliance with the Wraith backfires, the team must find a way to stop two Hive ships that are headed for Earth. Weir orders to attack and Sheppard is forced to rely on Michael to help him save McKay and Ronon, who are being held prisoners.

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the rainbow friends try to make a movie starring Princess Kiki, they discover they need Rainbow Ruby to pull everything together and make it happen. // Rainbow Ruby realizes trying to get 3 tots back to sleep can be both frustrating and fun.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki falls under a sleeping enchantment and needs a moving music box to cure her. // There's an epic traffic jam in Rainbow Village until Police Officer Rainbow Ruby arrives to help.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The Rainbow Village Annual Noodle Festival is in trouble. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Chef and makes noodles to save the day. // Ruby goes to Rainbow Village to help Gina get her confidence back by making her a star in the circus.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the rainbow fountain stops working, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Plumber and fixes the fountain so that everyone can cool off. // Getting ready for her royal party, Kiki turns purple when she accidentally picks Plumenberries instead of Rainbow Berries.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When young Jessy is afraid of going to the hair salon, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Hairdresser to show Jessy just how fun a visit to the salon can be. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dentist to help Jessy with a painful new tooth.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a babysitter to help babysit Jessy who, because of eating a magic bean, has grown into a giant baby! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a choreographer to help Thunderbell apologize to his friend, Mr. Sloth, in a truly musical way.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Kiki's crown loses a jewel, Rainbow Ruby becomes an Archaeologist and follows a map to an ancient treasure. // It's New Year's in Rainbow Village and everyone has gathered for the special dumpling feast.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki's is upset when her garden is a mess. Ruby becomes a gardener and makes the garden lovely. // Mysterious gifts are being left for people across Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Detective to work out who or what is leaving the gifts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the Rainbow Village train won't stop running on the track, Rainbow Ruby becomes a firefighter to bring the train to a stop. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a fashion designer and makes fantastically fruity outfits to save the day.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a lifeguard to help Ling Ling learn how to swim! //Thunderbell cannot find his beloved pet fish, so Rainbow Ruby becomes a detective to help solve the mystery and learns that the fish was actually a tadpole who is turning into a frog.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a party planner and holds a party that satisfies both Prince Frederick and Princess Kiki. // When the poppies make a mess in Rainbow Village's town square, Rainbow Ruby becomes a clean-up engineer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Something is wrong with Kiki's beloved pomeranian on the day of the Rainbow Village Flower Festival, and Rainbow Ruby becomes a veterinarian to save the pup! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a marine biologist to help an injured baby dolphin return home.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Chirpee's bird friends come for a visit and want to perch on people's heads. // Prince Frederick comes to observe rainbow fish in the lake, only to discover that the water is frozen, and the fish are gone for the season.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The moon is gone, and the villagers can't sleep without his friendly “goodnight, sweet dreams!” // When Thunderbell adds too much bubble bath to his tub, he is trapped in a giant soap bubble.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby becomes an architect to help redesign Felicia's house after it accidentally gets destroyed by Gina. // Gina brings a machine to make rainbow sorbet for everyone.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Thunderbell discovers an unknown, delicious fruit, he eats up all of it at once. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When three little stars run away to Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes an astronaut to return them safely to space. // When Kiki breaks a gem given to her by Prince Frederick, she doesn't get a chance to see its special sparkle.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: During a camping trip in the forest, the Rainbow Village friends see a “monster” and almost cancel the trip. // When Princess Kiki chips her leg before a ballet performance, Rainbow Ruby must take the stage to save the day!

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell's scooter breaks, and he must deliver packages on foot, which is slow and painful. // When Ling Ling's group portrait gift is ruined, Rainbow Ruby secretly takes photos and surprises him with a photo album of all of their friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the restaurant is overrun with customers who aren't being served properly, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Waitress. // When Ruby's spilled marbles pour down on Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Paramedic to treat the wounded.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Jessy's upset because everyone forgot the anniversary of the day she arrived in Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Chef to cheer her up. // When Ling Ling's cold won't go away, Doctor Ruby discovers his problem is really allergies.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When nobody can understand what roles actors are playing in a performance, Rainbow Ruby designs costumes for the cast! // When Paige gets swept up on a windy day, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Firefighter to bring her to safety.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Singer and puts on a concert that cheers everyone up! // When Thunderbell forgets to mail invitations to his secret-swap-present party, Rainbow Ruby devises a plan to deliver them just in time.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the field is covered in pokey pods before a rainbow ball tournament, Rainbow Ruby creates a golf game to whack the pods out of the field. // When things go missing in Rainbow Village, it's up to Detective Rainbow Ruby and Choco to find the culprit.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Pilot to help Chirpee see what it's like to fly, like other birds. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Fashion Designer and finds the perfect solution to Paige's fashion catastrophe.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: To help Ellie overcome her stage fright, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dance Teacher to help her friend take part in a dance-a-thon. // When the new fairy won't stop playing a game of hide-and-seek, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Baker to draw her out with the aroma.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang must clear up a wave of anti-Avatar sentiment and atone for something he did in the past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a possible Earthbending mentor at an underground tournament.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Traveling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town, where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids are prevented from taking the "easy way" into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city from invasion.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A series of short stories, highlighting different characters and their individual adventures in the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet, but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng the Dai Li when they attempt to show the Earth King the vast conspiracy taking place in his city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries at the end of season two, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Two men are determined to avenge their brother's death after he is killed in a thwarted armed robbery by an off-duty Lieutenant Bubba Skinner. Chief Gillespie must prepare to do all he can to keep Bubba safe. Now, he just needs Bubba to cooperate.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While hitchhiking his way to Sparta to visit Chief Gillespie, a Vietnamese teenager, Hank, witnesses a store robbery that turns into a murder. Hank was hoping that Gillespie would help him acquire citizenship, but now he's being framed for murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Ex-prizefighter, King Baylor, tries to blackmail his old boss, John Caminetto, a mafia kingpin in Detroit, who is wanted by the FBI. The FBI offers Baylor a deal, but he's desperate for cash and thinks he can force Caminetto to pay a bigger sum.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Amos Haber, a close friend of Chief Gillespie's, is devastated over the death of his wife and angrily blames her doctor, vowing revenge. When the doctor is found shot to death, the bullets match a gun belonging to Amos, but is Amos the killer?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A mild-mannered Sparta businessman shoots his wife and her lover and then flees with his daughter, holding her hostage in the family cabin out in the woods. The Sparta police must move with caution in fear he may shoot his daughter and then himself.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: After $100,000 goes missing from the bank where he works, Daryl Tyler, a friend of Bubba's, is framed for theft and kills himself. Only his young son knows the truth that could clear his late father's name; however, for now, he won't say a word.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex sends Walker and Trivette to go bring back a man who killed a ranger who was sent bring him in. Walker is sullen; it seems that the ranger who was killed was a friend of his and that Walker was the one who was suppose to bring the man in.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Cordell and Trivette go undercover to try and catch a bunch of big rig hijackers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette track a group of brothers who are robbing and assaulting people across the county. The deeper into the back country they go, it gets more difficult for Walker and Trivette. Worried, CD goes to help.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: There's a reunion of former Texas Rangers and there's a shooting competition with cops from all over the country coming to take part in. An old friend of Alex's, a Senator who is rumored to be running for President is also in town.

programme.desc: Walker and Trivette stop in a small town while transporting a likable prisoner. The sheriff rules the town with strict laws, harsh enforcement, and promotes racism with his deputies.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and old friend Penny Parker uncover a skeleton on the grounds of a mansion inherited by Penny, and MacGyver works to solve a year-old mystery regarding the disappearance of Penny's aunt.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: While visiting his hometown, MacGyver is forced to recall a painful incident from his past when he comes to the aid of a young boy involved in a shooting.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is forced to settle a dispute between the Amish and some land developers after an accident threatens the lives of two children.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton, posing as arms dealers, infiltrate a Latin American rebel camp where a wounded Pete Thornton is being held hostage.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver finds himself behind the wheel of an experimental race car after his buddy is injured In a mysterious crash during the qualifying heats.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton become the target of a kidnapping plot while searching for Jack's long lost mother, who is holding key evidence for a major federal case.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton uncover a drug-smuggling operation while out in the wilderness on a Phoenix Foundation training program.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver matches wits with a killer who has sprung his buddy from the insane asylum cell they share, in a desperate bid to take revenge on the lady cop who put him away.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Christine decides to make Richard responsible for helping Ritchie complete a big homework assignment, but soon she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Now that Barb is a co-owner of Christine's women's gym, the two women don't always agree on how to run it. Meanwhile, Matthew helps Ritchie find the perfect nanny to replace him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: After a car accident, Christine rents a huge luxury vehicle and guiltily enjoys it. Also, New Christine and Richard use unorthodox methods to teach Ritchie the U.S. state capitals.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Christine reluctantly signs Ritchie up for soccer after Mr. Harris informs her and Richard that Ritchie is having trouble making friends.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: After Christine convinces Matthew to let her come with him to his friend's party, she learns about her brother's colorful friends and a pretty ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: After Christine recommends a thoughtful birthday gift for New Christine to give attentive, romantic Richard, Christine can't tolerate his not knowing whose idea the present really was.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Rochelle orders a copy of her birth certificate, she realizes that she is actually one year younger than she thought she was and decides to start living her life with a new, younger attitude.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris is determined to spend New Year's Eve in Times Square, but Rochelle says Chris can only go if he finds a responsible adult to accompany him. The only problem is that the only people Chris can find to be his chaperone are two ex-convicts.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris and Greg decide to join the wrestling team to land a varsity jacket to impress the ladies.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris and Greg realize they'd better find fake IDs or they won't be able to go to the '18 and over' Fat Boys concert. Rochelle plans a surprise party for Julius.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Knowing that he needs to score well to help him get into college, Chris decides to cram for his PSAT test. When Rochelle makes the family attend a social event, Chris is left with no time to study and resorts to buying the PSAT answer key.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Coach Thurman witnesses Chris being bullied by Caruso and suggests Chris learn to box to defend himself.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris reluctantly agrees to hold onto a stash of marijuana for a criminal on the run, but he finds it difficult to find an appropriate hiding place that won't get him in trouble.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: As punishment for Chris' disruption of history class, Chris and his classmates are given the assignment of memorizing a famous speech from World War II and reciting it in front of the class.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma is mistaken for a server at a school event for Janet. Appa takes up math tutoring to prove his teaching prowess. Meanwhile, Shannon is finally single but isn't sure if Jung will make a move.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Janet plans to get the Kim family together for their first family dinner in 15 years, but it almost proves too much for Jung and Appa to handle.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Janet considers a new tattoo. Jung and Shannon exchange five-week-iversary gifts. Umma and Appa discover some juicy gossip about Pastor Nina.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa unwittingly becomes Jung's soccer coach. Umma insists that Janet learn to cook. Shannon forces a birthday party on Stacie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa eavesdrops on Gerald and Chelsea getting together to tell a lie to her parents. Appa says that he knows whenever Janet has told a lie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Janet is commissioned to take portraits of Shannon's cats. Umma entrusts Jung to pick Appa up from the dentist, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma reevaluates her role as a mother. Appa comes into money and tries to do a good thing with it. Jung and Shannon discover they have different concepts of sexy.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma come up with a new sleeping arrangement. Jung pursues a new career and tries to involve Janet. Meanwhile, Shannon and Kimchee discover a new, slightly terrifying side of Terence.

programme.title: Moesha

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.
